_comment: Model manifest for DeepStream fish pipeline.
'source' entries are upstream training checkpoints fetched by `mix models.fetch`.
sha256 is auto-pinned on first download — review the diff before committing.
ONNX exports are produced locally via `mix models.export` (export_*.py scripts).
.engine files are built by DeepStream on first launch and cached. Never store.
.so plugins are built from nvdsinfer_custom_impl_* via make.
